title: Underworld (disambiguation)
content:
'''Underworld''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*The [[Aleen Underworld]] of the [[planet]] [[Aleen]]
*The [[Coruscant Underworld]]
*The [[Underworld (Milvayne)|Underworld]] of [[Milvayne City]]'s lower levels, on the planet [[Milvayne]]
*'''[[Underworld E-Web]]''', an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster cannon]] owned by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Sentinel]]
*'''[[Underworld Trooper]]''', a set of armor worn by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Sentinel]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The [[Aleen Underworld]]
*The [[Coruscant Underworld]]

==Behind the scenes==
*The ''[[Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy]]'' article from [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]]
*The ''[[Underworld Appendix: Swoops, Spice, and Wretched Rogues]]'' article from Insider 89 online supplement
*The ''[[The Art of Underworld]]'' article from [[Star Wars Insider 89|Insider 89]] online supplement
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]''
*''[[Between the Worlds: UnderWorld]]'', third adventure of the [[Between the Worlds trilogy]] for the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force campaign]].
*The [[Underworld (folklore)|underworld]], a concept in [[Kashoonara]] folklore.
*''[[Star Wars: Underworld]]'', the working title of a cancelled live-action TV series
*The ''[[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika]]'' comic

{{Disambig}}
